shots.title: Research doc — harness hook formats
shots.notes: Created harness-research.md with compatibility matrix, hook config schemas for Cursor/Windsurf/OpenCode, tool name mappings, guard execution flow Mermaid diagram, and adapter authoring guide. 7 sections covering 6 harnesses.

shots.title: CursorAdapter + ADAPTER_PRIORITY detection ordering
shots.notes: Added ADAPTER_PRIORITY constant for deterministic detection (claude-code > cursor > windsurf > generic). CursorAdapter with JSON stdin/stdout protocol, .cursor/hooks.json config gen, Cursor-specific tool names, dispatcher script. 28 tests (24 adapter + 4 priority).

shots.title: WindsurfAdapter — exit-code-based guard integration

hazards.description: Dispatcher grep pattern initially used literal JSON format — wouldn't match prettified output with spaces around colons. Fixed in review.
2>/dev/null on slope guard stderr swallowed errors silently. Fixed to use SLOPE_GUARD_LOG env var.

shots.notes: WindsurfAdapter with JSON formatting, exit-code dispatcher script (exit 0=allow, exit 2=block), .windsurf/hooks.json config gen, guards manifest. Documented no-context-injection limitation. 25 tests. Two review findings caught and fixed.

shots.title: Documentation — compatibility matrix + authoring guide + codebase map
shots.notes: Updated CODEBASE.md via slope map. Compatibility matrix and authoring guide were already in the research doc from S35-1.

special_plays: Ran code + architect review (both tiers) after implementation — caught 2 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, and 6 LOW/NIT issues before merge

nutrition.description: Full build + test after every ticket and after review fixes. 1668 tests passing at completion, 0 failing.
7 commits: 4 feature + 3 review fix commits. All pushed before merge.
83 new tests across 3 test files (cursor adapter: 26, windsurf adapter: 26, harness: 31 including 5 integration + 2 registration completeness). 1668 total, up from 1637.
Review process caught stale Provider type in hook.ts (HIGH) and fragile grep pattern in Windsurf dispatcher (HIGH). Both fixed before merge. Review pays for itself.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth sprint building on the S34 adapter framework. CursorAdapter was clean — same JSON protocol, just different tool names and config format. WindsurfAdapter was trickier due to the exit-code translation layer, which is where both HIGH review findings came from.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The Windsurf dispatcher uses shell grep to parse JSON — test with both compact and prettified output. Use [[:space:]]* for optional whitespace. Always check slope guard exit code before parsing output. Set SLOPE_GUARD_LOG=/tmp/slope-guard.log for debugging.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The stale Provider type in hook.ts was a real bug — Windsurf users running lifecycle hooks (slope hook add session-start) would have had their hooks installed to .claude/hooks/ instead of .windsurf/hooks/. Architect review caught it.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: The adapter framework now covers Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf with a documented authoring guide. Any new harness with hook support is just a new adapter file.

bunker_locations: Windsurf dispatcher grep must handle prettified JSON — use [[:space:]]* not literal format
Windsurf can't inject context — guards that rely on additionalContext are allow-only on Windsurf
Stale parallel detection systems: if you add a new harness, update resolveHarnessId/getHooksDir in hook.ts too, not just the adapter
HOOK_EVENT_MAP filtering silently drops unsupported events (PreCompact, Stop on Windsurf) — test for exclusion explicitly
yardage_book_updates: src/core/harness.ts: Added ADAPTER_PRIORITY constant, detectAdapter() now iterates by priority
src/core/adapters/cursor.ts: CursorAdapter — JSON protocol, .cursor/hooks.json, Cursor tool names
src/core/adapters/windsurf.ts: WindsurfAdapter — JSON + exit-code dispatcher, .windsurf/hooks.json, Windsurf tool names
src/cli/commands/hook.ts: Replaced stale Provider/detectProvider with adapter-based resolveHarnessId
docs/backlog/harness-research.md: Harness hook research — compat matrix, config schemas, authoring guide
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, par 4, score 4 — par. 3 in_the_hole, 1 green (Windsurf had 2 rough hazards caught in review).
Slope 3 — external API research done in pre-sprint, new adapter classes following established patterns.
1352 lines added, 34 removed across 10 files. 3 new source files, 2 new test files, 1 new doc.
Both-tier review (code + architect) caught 12 findings total, all addressed before merge.
